SourceText: Thank you! We are testing this programme to see if it works.
text: Dankie! Ons toets hierdie program om te sien of dit werk.

SourceText: ✅ Participating in this study is optional.
text: ✅ Deelname aan hierdie studie is opsioneel.

SourceText: ✅ Your personal information is safe and private.
text: ✅ Jou persoonlike inligting is veilig en privaat.

SourceText: ✅ Your name and information will not be public, but your responses will be kept and used by researchers to learn how to support families like yours.
text: ✅ Jou naam en inligting sal nie openbaar wees nie, maar jou antwoorde sal gehou word en deur navorsers gebruik word om te leer hoe om gesinne soos joune te ondersteun.

SourceText: ✅ The information you share may also be combined with other families’ experiences so that we can understand how these programmes work across the world.
text: ✅ Die inligting wat jy deel, mag ook gekombineer word met ander gesinne se ervarings sodat ons kan verstaan hoe hierdie programme wêreldwyd werk.

SourceText: 📲 We will send you airtime as a thank you for your participation.
text: 📲 Ons sal vir jou lugtyd stuur om dank te betoon vir jou deelname.

SourceText: Would you like to participate in the study to help us learn how we can support parents like you in South Africa? 🇿🇦
text: Wil jy aan die studie deelneem om ons te help leer hoe ons ouers soos jy in Suid-Afrika kan ondersteun? 🇿🇦

SourceText: Sorry, I don't understand what you mean.
text: Jammer, ek verstaan nie wat jy bedoel nie.

SourceText: 🥳 Welcome to our study! If you decide to join, you will be invited to complete 3 surveys.
text: 🥳 Welkom by ons studie! As jy besluit om deel te neem, sal jy uitgenooi word om 3 opnames in te vul.

SourceText: 🌱 The surveys will ask you questions about your life and your relationship with your child.
text: 🌱 Die opnames sal jou vrae vra oor jou lewe en jou verhouding met jou kind.

SourceText: ✏️ After completing the first survey, you will receive R25 airtime to thank you.
text: ✏️ Nadat jy die eerste opname voltooi het, sal jy R25 lugtyd ontvang om jou te bedank.

SourceText: 💬 You will then receive ParentText on WhatsApp from this number.
text: 💬 Jy sal dan ParentText op WhatsApp van hierdie nommer ontvang.

SourceText: ✏️ 1 month later, you will be asked to complete a 2nd survey after which you will receive R50 airtime to thank you.
text: ✏️ 1 maand later sal jy gevra word om 'n tweede opname in te vul, waarna jy R50 lugtyd sal ontvang om jou te bedank.

SourceText: ✏️ 3 months later, you will receive a 3rd survey. You will receive R50 airtime after completing that final survey to thank you.
text: ✏️ 3 maande later sal jy 'n 3de opname ontvang. Om jou te bedank, sal jy R50 lugtyd ontvang nadat jy daardie finale opname voltooi het.

SourceText: 📲 After each survey, the money will be sent to this WhatsApp number as mobile airtime.
text: 📲 Na elke opname sal die geld na hierdie WhatsApp nommer gestuur word as mobiele lugtyd.

SourceText: 🤐 If there are any questions that you feel uncomfortable answering, you do not have to answer them.
text: 🤐 As daar enige vrae is wat jy ongemaklik vind om te beantwoord, hoef jy dit nie te beantwoord nie.

SourceText: Press YES if you have read and understand the above document, agree with the messages, and give consent to participate in the study. Type "EXIT" if you do not want to participate.

SourceText: South African phone numbers should begin with the number zero, please enter a ten-digit phone number beginning with the number zero.
text: Suid-Afrikaanse telefoonnommers moet met die nommer nul begin, voer asseblief 'n tien-syfer telefoonnommer in wat met die nommer nul begin.

SourceText: We would also like to know about your teen's opinion of ParentText. Can a member of our research team contact them for a quick phone call where we will ask them a few multiple choice questions? Before giving your consent, please read this for all information:
text: Ons sou ook graag die mening van jou tiener oor ParentText wil weet. Kan 'n lid van ons navorsingspan hulle kontak vir 'n vinnige telefoongesprek waar ons hulle 'n paar meerkeusevrae sal vra? Lees asseblief hierdie vir alle inligting voordat jy toestemming gee:

SourceText: {teen_consent_form}
text: {teen_consent_form}

SourceText: Thanks for giving your consent!  What cell phone number can we reach your teen on?
text: Dankie dat jy jou toestemming gegee het! Watter selfoonnommer kan ons jou tiener op bereik?

SourceText: Who should we ask to speak to (your teens's name)?
text: Met wie moet ons vra om met (jou tiener se naam) te praat?

SourceText: Please speak to your teen about this. We will be in touch with you telephonically to answer any questions that you might have before we call your teen for the interview and to arrange a time which will be best for us to interview them. What cell phone number can we reach you on?
text: Praat asseblief met jou tiener hieroor. Ons sal telefonies met jou in verbinding tree om enige vrae wat jy mag hê te beantwoord voordat ons jou tiener vir die onderhoud kontak en om 'n tyd te reël wat die beste sal wees om hulle te ondervra. Watter selfoonnommer kan ons jou op bereik?

SourceText: 🎉🎉 You are done! 🎉🎉
text: 🎉🎉 Jy is klaar! 🎉🎉

SourceText: 💙 Thank you very much for completing this final survey and taking the time to help us with this study.
text: 💙 Baie dankie dat jy hierdie finale opname voltooi het en die tyd geneem het om ons te help met hierdie studie.

SourceText: 🥳 You will now receive R50 airtime as a token of thanks.
text: 🥳 Jy sal nou R50 lugtyd ontvang as 'n teken van waardeering.

SourceText: 💚 We wish you all the best with @fields.child_nickname and remember, you can access this content at any time!
text: 💚 Ons wens jou alles van die beste toe met @fields.child_nickname en onthou, jy kan hierdie inhoud enige tyd besoek!
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.
